title: Mulailah Gastropub
description: Three years in charge of the brand's visual direction: campaigns, events and promotional content sustained by a consistent graphic system.
challenge: Keeping a gastronomy brand alive and recognizable through three years of constant campaigns, events and promotions, without diluting its identity.
objective: Build a graphic system applicable to social media, commercial communication and point-of-sale pieces, capable of sustaining the business's continuous promotional operation.
role: Graphic Designer and Creative Direction: I developed the visual direction of the brand's campaigns, events and promotional content.
strategy: Ensure consistency between identity, photography, promotional messages and brand experience at every customer touchpoint.

process.title: Graphic system
process.description: Design of a system applied to social media, commercial communication and point of sale.

process.title: Campaigns & events
process.description: Visual direction of the brand's promotional campaigns and events throughout the year.

process.title: Brand consistency
process.description: Care for coherence between identity, photography, messages and brand experience.

results.summary: Three years of non-stop visual direction: an identity that stayed recognizable across every flyer, package and feed piece.

seo.title: Mulailah Gastropub — Case study · Adrián D. Bonilla
seo.description: Creative direction and graphic design for Mulailah Gastropub: graphic system, campaigns, events and brand communication (2021–2024).
